common.tagline: Plan the wedding you want, not the one you're pressured into
common.name: Name

hero.subtitle: See real costs, compare vendors at every price tier, and get a budget your whole family can agree on — backed by real data from Tashkent's wedding market.

problems.title: The real problem with weddings in Uzbekistan
problems.subtitle: It's not about finding vendors. It's about the financial and social pressure that makes weddings cost more than a year's income.
problems.stat1Label: of weddings cost more than a year's income
problems.stat2Label: of couples regret how much they spent
problems.stat3Label: platforms for real cost comparison in Uzbekistan

features.title: Everything you need to plan smart

budgetPlanner.title: AI Budget Planner
budgetPlanner.description: Enter your budget, guest count, and priorities. Get a realistic breakdown with real local prices — not generic advice.

comparison.title: Multi-Tier Comparison
comparison.description: Compare catering, venues, and services at budget/standard/premium tiers side by side. See exactly what your money buys.

pressureProof.title: Pressure-Proof Data
pressureProof.description: Share a professional cost breakdown with family. Reframe 'we're cutting costs' as 'we did the math.' Numbers speak louder.

forEveryone.title: For Everyone Involved
forEveryone.description: Built for couples, families paying, wedding organizers, and vendors. Everyone sees what they need in one place.

categories.title: Compare vendors at every price tier
categories.subtitle: Every category has budget, standard, and premium options. Find the perfect match for your wedding.

steps.title: From 'I don't know where to start' to 'I've got this'

step1.title: Tell us your budget
step1.description: Enter your total budget, guest count, and city. Or say 'I don't know' and let us help figure it out.

step2.title: See your breakdown
step2.description: Get a realistic cost allocation across all wedding categories based on real Tashkent market data.

step3.title: Compare & decide
step3.description: Compare vendors at different price tiers. Ask our AI 'what's the best catering under 5M for 100 guests?'

items.name: Dilnoza & Sardor
items.text: We saved 12M UZS by switching from a 200-person to 80-person wedding. The budget planner showed us exactly where the money was going.

items.name: Farida & Ozodbek
items.text: Showing our families the cost comparison ended the 'you must invite everyone' conversation. Numbers are harder to argue with.

items.name: Malika, Wedding Organizer
items.text: As a wedding organizer, managing 5 clients' budgets in one dashboard saves me hours every week. Game changer.

cta.title: Ready to plan smarter?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of couples who chose information over pressure. Your perfect wedding starts with a realistic budget.

footer.description: Plan the wedding you want, not the one you're pressured into. See real costs, real comparisons, and control the number.
footer.copyright: 2026 To'y Platform. Made with love for Uzbekistan.

budget.title: Build your wedding budget
budget.subtitle: A few inputs, and we'll show you exactly where your money should go — based on real Tashkent market data.

guests.title: How many guests?
guests.info: According to survey data, 65% of Uzbek weddings have 100-200 guests. Smaller weddings save an average of 40-60% on catering alone.

budget.title: What's your total budget?
budget.premiumRangeText: Premium range — consider if this aligns with your priorities

priorities.title: What matters most to you?
priorities.description: Drag the sliders to allocate your budget across categories. The percentages should add up to 100%.

plan.title: Your Wedding Budget Plan
tips: Book venues in off-season (Nov-Feb) for 20-30% savings
Consider osh/plov instead of a full multi-course menu
Use seasonal flowers — they're 50% cheaper and fresher
A talented DJ is often 40-60% cheaper than a live band

vendors.title: Compare vendors at every price tier
vendors.subtitle: Every category has budget, standard, and premium options. Find the perfect match for your wedding.
vendors.noVendorsDesc: Try adjusting your filters or search query.

dashboard.title: Wedding Organizer Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your clients, vendors, and wedding timelines in one place.

login.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue planning your perfect wedding
login.registerSubtitle: Start planning the wedding you want

guestList.title: Guest List Manager
guestList.subtitle: Track RSVPs, dietary requirements, and seating arrangements.
